title: Intense Brazilian Baby Squid Skewers
description: A roasted, shaggy, crowd-pleaser Brazilian dish featuring baby squid, char-grill-yang, pescatarian-friendly, this recipe is perfect for any seafood lover.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, ginger, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the baby squid to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated squid onto the wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the squid skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are charred and cooked through.
Brush the skewers with additional olive oil if needed to prevent drying out.
Serve the grilled squid skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Offer lime wedges on the side for squeezing over the squid.
